ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account (hashed) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the player */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "white_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the white player */,
  "black_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the black player */,
  "site" TEXT /* Site where the game was played */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control for the game (e.g., blitz, rapid, classical) */,
  "eco" TEXT /* ECO code of the opening */,
  "opening" TEXT /* Name of the opening */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., online, offline, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_white_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("white_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_black_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("black_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the move belongs to */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Number of the move in the game */,
  "move_notation" TEXT /* Notation of the move (e.g., e4, Nf3) */,
  "eco" TEXT /* ECO code of the opening */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the move (e.g., good, bad, neutral) */,
  "commentary" TEXT /* Commentary about the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the opponent belongs to */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "opponent_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the opponent */,
  "opponent_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded or updated the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., upload, update) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_log_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "site" TEXT /* Site where the tournament was held */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., online, offline, grand slam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tournament" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the game in the tournament */,
  "board_number" INTEGER /* Board number of the game in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., game_upload, tournament_registration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prediction belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_result" TEXT /* Predicted result of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Loss rate of the player */,
  "draw_rate" REAL /* Draw rate of the player */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the player */,
  "highest_rating" INTEGER /* Highest rating achieved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player on the given date */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_standings" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "player_id")
)
